name: BGP Toolkit
description: BGP/ASN/IP intelligence Tool: https://bgp.he.net/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #703 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map BGP Toolkit output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved BGP Toolkit output file to parse instead of running it live.
